# Lessons Learned

## 2026-05-06
- Full-file rewrites are safer than partial replaces when legacy orchestration files contain repeated sections.
- Keep one canonical agent roster and remove deprecated agent files to avoid routing ambiguity.
- Always align memory templates with the active project domain before enabling multi-agent workflows.

## 2026-05-08
- Scope specialist agents to real ownership boundaries in the repository, not aspirational architecture from another project.
- Put the delegated work summary in a single memory log so orchestration history stays searchable.
- Refresh setup steps and prompt names when changing agent rosters; stale workflow helpers cause silent drift.
